hero.subtitle: Webhook capture → Multi-source enrichment → AI attribution → Instant alerts. End-to-end < 5s, giving you a 10-minute head start over retail traders.

capabilities.title: Four Core Engines
capabilities.subtitle: End-to-end automation from on-chain data capture to risk protection

signal.title: On-chain Signal Capture
signal.subtitle: On-chain Signal Capture
signal.description: Real-time monitoring of Solana on-chain transactions via Helius Enhanced Webhooks, capturing every swap operation from smart money wallets in milliseconds.

ai.title: AI Attribution Engine
ai.subtitle: AI Attribution Engine
ai.description: Claude AI deep-analyzes each trade's context — token fundamentals, liquidity changes, historical patterns — generating a concise 50-word buy rationale.

discovery.title: Smart Wallet Discovery
discovery.subtitle: Smart Wallet Discovery
discovery.description: Birdeye scoring engine continuously scans active on-chain addresses, evaluating win rate, PNL, and trading frequency to automatically onboard high-scoring wallets.

shield.title: Rug Pull Protection
shield.subtitle: Rug Protection Shield
shield.description: Automatically detects Mint Authority and Freeze Authority status, flagging risk levels in alerts to help you avoid high-risk tokens.

workflow.title: From On-chain Event to Your Phone
workflow.subtitle: Fully automated 4-step pipeline, end-to-end latency < 5 seconds

step1.title: On-chain Capture
step1.description: Helius Webhook receives Solana on-chain smart money transaction events in real-time

step2.title: Multi-source Enrichment
step2.description: DexScreener liquidity + Solana RPC authority checks, completed within 2 seconds

step3.title: AI Analysis
step3.description: Claude AI generates buy rationale attribution with risk assessment

step4.title: Instant Push
step4.description: Telegram + Web Dashboard dual-channel alerts, latency < 5 seconds

security.title: Security Is the Baseline, Not a Selling Point

e2e.title: End-to-end Encryption
e2e.description: All data transmitted through TLS encrypted channels

readonly.title: Read-only Tracking
readonly.description: Only monitors public on-chain transactions, never touches your assets

noKeys.title: No Private Keys
noKeys.description: Zero private key submission required, zero asset risk
